missionStatement: To develop a comprehensive, AI-driven platform for aircraft maintenance management that serves as the single source of truth for all maintenance operations, replacing inefficient spreadsheet-based workflows.

primaryGoals: Centralize all maintenance operations onto a single, authoritative platform.
Enhance operational efficiency through intelligent automation and streamlined UX.
Ensure regulatory compliance and safety with robust, auditable tracking.
coreObjectives: Eliminate spreadsheet-based workflows for scheduling and resource management.
Automate maintenance planning using AI to optimize schedules and de-conflict resources.
Streamline the entire maintenance lifecycle from high-level Work Orders to granular Squawks.
Empower technicians, leads, and administrators with role-specific tools and information.

frontend.ui_ux: Professional, dark-themed aesthetic prioritizing data density and clarity for an enterprise application.

backend_future.services: Microservices architecture using Node.js or Python (FastAPI)
backend_future.hosting: Kubernetes on a major cloud provider (AWS/GCP/Azure)

functionalModules.goal: Provide a high-level overview of all aircraft and serve as the entry point for AI-driven planning.
features: AI-powered schedule optimization to generate de-conflicted maintenance visit plans.
Digital logbook for tracking flight hours and maintenance entries.

functionalModules.goal: Manage the lifecycle of all planned (Work Orders) and unplanned (Repair Orders) maintenance.
features: Dedicated dashboards with searchable and sortable lists for each order type.
Color-coded status indicators for at-a-glance information.
Drill-down to detailed views for managing individual tasks (Squawks).

functionalModules.goal: Provide a powerful, centralized interface for all granular maintenance execution activities.
features: Tabbed interface for managing individual Squawks within an order.
Multi-faceted detail view for each Squawk: Item Details, Service (time tracking), Parts, and Tools.
Comprehensive, permission-based digital signature and sign-off workflow.

functionalModules.goal: Maintain real-time inventory accuracy, track tooling, and streamline procurement.
features: Inventory dashboards for Parts and Consumables.
Purchase Order generation workflow from low-stock items.
AI-Powered Receiving: Gemini API analyzes uploaded packing slip images to extract data and update inventory.
Tooling dashboard with calibration tracking and vendor quote generation.

functionalModules.goal: Manage the technician roster and track labor productivity.
features: Technician roster with certifications and productivity metrics.
Data visualization (bar chart) to compare total vs. billable hours.

functionalModules.goal: Automate and de-risk the process of migrating data from legacy spreadsheets.
features: AI-Powered Data Cleansing using Gemini to validate, correct, and structure uploaded CSV data for Work Orders, Tooling, and Consumables.
Interactive staging area for user review before committing data to the live system.

progressAndFutureImprovements.currentState: A feature-complete frontend prototype with a polished UI/UX. All core AI features are implemented. State is managed locally in React.
nextSteps: Develop backend services (API, database) to replace local state management.
Implement a robust authentication and role-based access control (RBAC) system.
Integrate WebSockets for real-time application updates.
Expand AI capabilities (e.g., predictive maintenance, natural language querying).
Build a dedicated reporting and analytics dashboard.
